item.title: Master's Thesis
item.description: Vertex Superalgebras from Factorization Algebras I’ve recently completed my master’s research project, which culminated in the defense of my master’s thesis titled Vertex Superalgebras from Factorizaton Algebras. During this work I was supported by a Master’s Research Studentship from IST-ID and enjoyed the supervision and collaboration of John Huerta. What is this about? My thesis has two main goals: Provide a gentle and relatively self-contained introduction to the factorization algebra approach to quantum field theory developed by Kevin Costello and Owen Gwilliam.

item.title: On the job market
item.description: I’ve recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon. I’m happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20. I’ve begun applying for jobs and PhD positions! Feel free to reach out.

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Welcome to my personal website! I’m interested in mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. You can read more about me here or contact me at rmp at ruimp.com. I’m always happy to discuss anything math and science related.
